title: allBIO 80L Compostable Kitchen & Kerbside Bin Bags/Garden Sacks – Pack of 60
features: Extra thick to help prevent leakage and damage.
description: allBIO 80L Compostable Kitchen & Kerbside Bin Bags / Garden Sacks – Pack of 60 Contents: 3 rolls of compostable bags – 20 bags per roll. Bag Size: 80 Litre – Approx. 144cm rim x 91cm length with a gathered base. Designed for Strength These liners feature a Star Base , where the bottom is gathered and sealed for added strength. This design helps prevent the liner from breaking when full of waste without affecting the overall capacity. These bags are also suitable for general garden waste. More Information All our bin liners are certified compostable according to the European standard EN-13432 and bear the Seedling logo.

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: Food Waste, Garden Waste, Home Composting
